mapper.select: SELECT DATE(created_at) AS `date`, COALESCE(SUM(faq_referenced),0) AS answered, COALESCE(SUM(handoff),0) AS handoffs FROM chatbot_response_log WHERE created_at >= #{from} AND created_at < #{toExclusive} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY `date`

SELECT r.created_at AS createdAt, r.question AS question, f.question AS faqQuestion, r.top_similarity AS similarity, r.handoff AS handoff FROM chatbot_response_log r LEFT JOIN faq f ON f.id = r.matched_faq_id WHERE r.faq_referenced = 1 AND r.created_at >= #{from} AND r.created_at < #{toExclusive} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chatbot_response_log WHERE top_similarity IS NOT NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chatbot_response_log WHERE top_similarity IS NOT NULL AND top_similarity < #{threshold}

SELECT FLOOR(ROUND(top_similarity * 100) / 5) AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM chatbot_response_log WHERE top_similarity IS NOT NULL AND top_similarity >= 0.30 AND top_similarity < 0.95 GROUP BY FLOOR(ROUND(top_similarity * 100) / 5) ORDER BY bucket
